message:
fix(writing): de-slopify lone emdash in restructured meta description

Commit 7ce8f4c updated the meta description + content.ts blurb to match
the restructured article but introduced a single emdash ("planning —
four steps"). The de-slopify pass (2f9ba7d) removed all 68 emdashes
from the article body; keeping the metadata consistent with that
discipline. Swapped the emdash for a colon that naturally introduces
the four-item list.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2231,7 +2231,7 @@ export const writingHighlights: WritingItem[] = [
     source: "Blog",
     category: "AI Agents & Law",
     blurb:
-      "A Claude Code / Codex skill that handles the expensive intake portion of estate planning — four steps to install, one weekend of work, roughly $120, and a structured document package for attorney review.",
+      "A Claude Code / Codex skill that handles the expensive intake portion of estate planning: four steps to install, one weekend of work, roughly $120, and a structured document package for attorney review.",
     date: "2026-04-19",
     featured: true,
     draft: true,
